scorza23: shows [9c Ad] (high card Ace - King+Queen+Jack+Nine kicker)
scorza23 collected 2667 from pot
MMM1975MMM finished the tournament in 3rd place and received $1.53.

Board [Kc Jc Qd 8d 6s]
